title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Cisco India South Asia Partners in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
